working: Staff-Client eNews - May 2026 (05-19) drove the single biggest traffic lift: +66.5% over baseline (17.0 to 28.3 daily sessions) on a ~9,731-send list at a 48.53% open rate.
The June reminder cadence is paying off: Alumni eNews Final Reminder - June 2026 (06-03) lifted sessions +65.2% (21.0 to 34.7 daily).
Constant Contact open rates remain exceptional: 52.16% average across 100 campaigns, far above the 25-35% health/nonprofit benchmark; Alumni eNews - June (05-27) hit 55.81%.
Best engagement-per-open came from Alumni eNews - May 2026 (05-02): 1.79% click rate and 3.77% click-to-open, the highest of any send in the window.
Referral traffic grew vs last run: 143 sessions (7.0%) up from 132 (6.4%), and Organic Social ticked up to 46 from 44.
not_working: UTM leakage is systemic: all 8 newsletter sends show email_sessions_3d = 0 while posting 21-53 direct_sessions_3d each, so GA4 is mis-crediting newsletter clicks as Direct. The Email channel logged just 1 session in the whole 90-day window.
Direct dominates the mix at 50.7% (1,034 sessions) - inflated by that email mis-attribution - which masks true channel performance.
Several sends had negative lift: Alumni eNews - May 2026 (05-02) at -50.2%, Staff-Client eNews - April (04-25) at -15.7%, and Alumni eNews - June (05-27) at -9.8% despite a 55.81% open.
SEO signals slipped: GSC clicks fell to 3 from 6, impressions dropped to 1,447 from 1,684, and impression-weighted average position worsened to 31.49 from 19.86.
Organic Social is still marginal at 2.3% (46 sessions) and window total sessions edged down to 2,041 from 2,056.
do_next: Add utm_source=constantcontact&utm_medium=email (plus utm_campaign per send) to every newsletter link - this is the highest-leverage fix and would convert the 21-53 mis-credited Direct sessions per send into trackable Email attribution.

Lean into the proven cadence: large Staff-Client sends (e.g. the 05-19 send, +66.5%) and Alumni reminder/final-reminder follow-ups (05-04 +5.9%, 06-03 +65.2%) consistently lift sessions - keep the multi-touch reminder sequence.
Repromote Alumni eNews content themes, which delivered the top opens (55.81%) and clicks (1.79% / 3.77% CTOR); rework the underperforming Staff-Client April template (42.06% open, -15.7% lift).
Investigate the SEO slip: avg position fell from 19.86 to 31.49 and impressions are down ~14% - audit which of the 68 tracked pages lost ranking and prioritize on-page fixes.
Send a fresh newsletter - the most recent went out 06-03 (26 days ago); the list is highly engaged (52% opens) and overdue for a touch.
summary: All three data sources (GA4, Constant Contact, GSC) are live. 90-day traffic held roughly flat at 2,041 sessions, led by Direct (50.7%) which is inflated by untagged newsletter links - every one of the 8 sends shows zero attributed email sessions. The 05-19 Staff-Client and 06-03 Alumni reminder sends drove the strongest lifts (+66.5% and +65.2%), but adding UTM tags is the single most important next step.
